user_id.description: The `user_id` of an active user the TOTP registration should be tied to. You may use an `external_id` here if one is set for the user.

expiration_minutes.description: The expiration for the TOTP instance. If the newly created TOTP is not authenticated within this time frame the TOTP will be unusable. Defaults to 1440 (1 day) with a minimum of 5 and a maximum of 1440.
